summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard (Financial & Marketing tabs) and Vakman Dashboard (Opdrachten, Agenda, Profiel tabs). All 38 backend API tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.

design_issues.screen: Admin Financial Tab - Daily Revenue Chart
issues: All bars show €0 revenue for last 7 days even though total revenue is €1243 - this is because bookings were created before the 7-day window

critical_code_review_comments: Admin endpoints (/api/admin/*) are currently unprotected - no authentication required. This should be secured before production.
Test vakman (test.vakman@demo.nl) is not approved (is_approved: false), so no bookings are visible in the Vakman Dashboard - this is expected behavior.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test vakman account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin dashboard features (Financial, Marketing tabs) and Vakman Dashboard features (Opdrachten, Agenda, Profiel tabs) are working correctly. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/. Test vakman account exists but is not approved, so no bookings are visible. Admin endpoints are unprotected (no auth required).

financial_tab.period_selector: PASS - Vandaag, Week, Maand, Jaar all working
financial_tab.revenue_stats: PASS - Totale Omzet, Betaald, Openstaand, Gem. Orderwaarde displayed
financial_tab.csv_export: PASS - Export button triggers download with toast notification

marketing_tab.service_performance: PASS - Shows bookings and revenue per service
marketing_tab.top_cities: PASS - Shows top 3 cities with booking counts

opdrachten_tab.booking_list: PASS - Shows empty state (account not approved)
opdrachten_tab.status_filters: PASS - Alle, Nieuw, Geaccepteerd, Bezig, Voltooid
opdrachten_tab.detail_panel: PASS - Shows placeholder when no booking selected

agenda_tab.today_highlight: PASS - Current day highlighted in orange

profiel_tab.profile_info: PASS - Shows name, email, phone, service type, location, hourly rate, description
profiel_tab.availability_toggle: PASS - Toggle switch present and functional
